note: Repixelizer now has one live reconstruction engine: phase-field in src/repixelizer/phase_field.py. The old tray-based optimizer is gone.
source_structure is tracked alongside source_fidelity because lattice-only scoring could rank visibly better outputs as worse.
The d9fa411 phase-field tuning pass was a real regression on the pinned badge case; reverting it restores the known-good badge result exactly.
